h1.visual_description: Bold, larger serif font, prefixed with a capital letter indicating an appendix section.

h2.visual_description: Bold serif font, same size as body text, formatted as a run-in heading followed by a period and immediate paragraph text.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table caption prefix, typically located below the table.
Hyperlinked cross-references (e.g., to tables) or citations.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical author-year format, e.g., (Shi et al., 2023)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Standard academic margins; ignore potential page numbers or running headers if present in full document.
